name: @agentsforx/mcp
description: MCP server for Agents For X, the real-time writing assistant for X — fetch the user's voice context and write posts and replies in their voice, voice-check drafts, then draft, schedule, and publish, plus analytics. Generation available as a fallback.

scripts.build: tsup src/stdio.ts src/server.ts src/tools.ts src/client.ts src/tool-doc-gen.ts --format esm --dts --clean --out-dir dist
scripts.inspector: npm run build && npx @modelcontextprotocol/inspector node dist/stdio.js
